summary: Iteration 79: Tested Kitchen Routing module, Seasonal Templates, and PWA Service Worker. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed: Kitchen Routing panel with 4 tabs (Overview, Stations, Printers & KDS, Outlet Routing) showing 8 stations, 5 printers, 1 outlet. Seasonal Templates section in Menu Designer with 6 holiday themes (Valentine's, New Year's, Thanksgiving, Christmas, Summer, Mother's Day) - all apply correctly. Guest ordering page (/guest-order) works with auth and menu display.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Kitchen Routing tabs, Seasonal Templates, and Guest Ordering working)

seed_data_creation: Kitchen Routing seeds 8 stations and 5 printers on first API call
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 79 tested 3 new features: 1) Kitchen Routing - standalone module under HR & Administration > Kitchen Routing with 4 tabs (Overview, Stations, Printers & KDS, Outlet Routing). Seeds 8 stations (Grill, Sauté, Garde Manger, Pastry, Fry, Expo Window, Pizza Oven, Banquet Prep) and 5 printers (KDS-Hot Line, KDS-Cold/Pastry, KDS-Expo, Label Printer, Bar Printer). 2) Seasonal Templates - 6 holiday presets in Menu Designer (valentines, new_years, thanksgiving, christmas, summer, mothers_day). Located at: IRD & Minibar > Guest Platform > Menu Designer. 3) PWA Service Worker enhanced with IndexedDB offline queue and auto-sync. Note: IRD & Minibar is under EVENTS & CATERING section, not CULINARY OPERATIONS.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/kitchen-routing/dashboard - returns KPIs (8 stations, 5 printers, 1 outlet)
GET /api/kitchen-routing/stations - returns 8 stations with names and colors
GET /api/kitchen-routing/printers - returns 5 printers with IP addresses and technology
GET /api/kitchen-routing/outlets/default - returns Main Kitchen with 8 stations and 5 printers
PWA cacheable endpoints verified (health, dashboard, kitchen-routing, guest-order)
frontend_kitchen_routing_tests: Kitchen Routing panel opens from sidebar (HR & Administration > Kitchen Routing)
Overview tab shows KPIs: 8 stations, 5 printers, 1 outlet, 5 online
Stations tab shows 8 station cards with colors
Printers & KDS tab shows 5 printer cards with IP addresses and technology
Outlet Routing tab shows Main Kitchen with mapped stations/printers
frontend_seasonal_templates_tests: IRD & Minibar panel opens from sidebar (EVENTS & CATERING > IRD & Minibar)
Guest Platform tab has 3 sub-tabs: QR & Periods, Menu Designer, Menu Items
Menu Designer shows Layout Presets (Classic, Modern, Bistro, Fine Dining, Brewery)
Menu Designer shows Seasonal Templates section with 6 buttons
Valentine's button applies pink/red theme with 'Valentine's Dining' header
Christmas button applies dark green theme with 'Holiday Dining' header
Classic button resets to light theme with 'In-Room Dining' header
Live Preview updates in real-time when themes are applied
frontend_guest_order_tests: /guest-order auth screen loads with dynamic styling
Menu page shows All Day Menu with 17 items
Categories displayed: Food & Dining (8), Beverages (3), Sundries (3), Amenities (3)
Menu items show emojis, descriptions, prices, prep times, and Add buttons
